target_profile.focus: Gaming-focused VCs or AI infrastructure funds

fund.name: BITKRAFT Ventures
fund.thesis: Global early- and mid-stage investment platform for gaming, esports, and interactive media

partners.name: Jens Hilgers
partners.title: Founding General Partner
partners.background: Serial entrepreneur, founded ESL (acquired), G2 Esports. Pioneer of esports industry.
partners.thesis_fit: Deep gaming operator background, values game design and player experience

partners.name: Piers Kicks
partners.title: Venture Partner
partners.background: Founding Partner at Delphi Digital, crypto x gaming specialist since 2021
partners.thesis_fit: Blockchain gaming, Web3 infrastructure, metaverse technologies

packets.fit_rationale: Perfect stage and check size match. Deep gaming expertise with operator DNA. Strong global presence. Active in AI + gaming convergence.
packets.outreach_angle: ESL founder pedigree - they understand competitive gaming and AI's role in next-gen experiences

fund.name: Griffin Gaming Partners
fund.thesis: Premier investment vehicle singularly focused on the video game sector

partners.name: Phil Sanderson
partners.title: Managing Director & Co-Founder
partners.background: 28 years in VC, previously at Walden, IDG Ventures/Ridge Ventures
partners.thesis_fit: Longest-tenured gaming VC, deep network, understands game monetization

partners.name: Peter Levin
partners.title: Managing Director & Co-Founder
partners.background: Former President of Interactive Ventures at Lionsgate, co-founder of Nerdist Industries
partners.thesis_fit: Media + gaming convergence, platform strategy, content IP

packets.fit_rationale: Largest dedicated gaming fund. Perfect stage match. LA-based (gaming hub). Deep industry relationships. High-conviction bets.
packets.outreach_angle: Industry veteran fund - focus on how AI transforms game development economics

fund.name: Hetz Ventures
fund.thesis: Early-stage investor in Israeli startups specializing in data and AI infrastructure, cybersecurity and enterprise software

partners.name: Judah Taub
partners.title: Managing Partner & Co-Founder
partners.background: Former Head of Data at Lansdowne Partners ($20B hedge fund), Harvard Business School
partners.thesis_fit: Data-driven investor, deep technical expertise, Forbes 30 Under 30

partners.name: Pavel Livshiz
partners.title: Partner
partners.background: Tech and data-driven investor with hands-on operational support
partners.thesis_fit: Active portfolio support, European LP network for expansion

packets.fit_rationale: Perfect check size match. Strong AI infrastructure thesis. Israel = gaming tech talent hub. Data-driven approach aligns with AI tooling. European network for expansion.
packets.outreach_angle: Data + AI thesis alignment - focus on AI infrastructure for game development

fund.name: Amplify Partners
fund.thesis: Early-stage investor for technical founders building developer tools, AI/ML, data infrastructure, and cybersecurity

partners.name: Lenny Pruss
partners.title: General Partner
partners.background: 8+ years working with technical founders. Led investments in dbt Labs, Temporal, Runway
partners.thesis_fit: Developer tools specialist, ML infrastructure, technical founder advocate

partners.name: Mike Dauber
partners.title: General Partner
partners.background: Co-runs Amplify with Sunil Dhaliwal. Former Battery Ventures. Long-term firm builder.
partners.thesis_fit: Enterprise infrastructure, cloud computing, hands-on board member

packets.fit_rationale: Perfect stage and check size for seed. Leading AI infrastructure investor. Technical founder focus. Strong portfolio (Runway, Modal, Luma). Developer tools thesis fits AI game tooling.
packets.outreach_angle: AI infrastructure leader - emphasize technical founding team and dev tools for games

fund.name: Konvoy Ventures
fund.thesis: Thesis-driven venture capital firm investing in platforms and technologies shaping the future of gaming

partners.name: Jason Chapman
partners.title: Managing Partner & Co-Founder
partners.background: Former BlackRock product analyst, gaming enthusiast. CSGO, Halo, AoE player.
partners.thesis_fit: True gamer DNA, understands game mechanics deeply, data-driven approach

partners.name: Josh Chapman
partners.title: Managing Partner & Co-Founder
partners.background: Former banking analyst, BlackRock. Deep gaming industry expertise.
partners.thesis_fit: Web3 gaming thesis, blockchain + gaming convergence, platform investments

packets.fit_rationale: Perfect stage and check size match. Founded by gamers for gaming. Strong Web3 + AI gaming thesis. Active seed investor. Portfolio includes Solsten (AI player analytics).
packets.outreach_angle: Gamer-first fund - emphasize player experience transformation via AI
